bard.name: Vicious Mockery
bard.description: You unleash insults laced with subtle enchantments at one creature you can see. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d4 psychic damage and have disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

bard.name: Minor Illusion
bard.description: You create a sound or image of an object within range. A creature that examines the illusion can identify it as such with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC.

bard.name: Mage Hand
bard.description: A spectral floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. You can use it to manipulate objects, open unlocked doors, stow or retrieve items, or pour vials.

bard.name: Dancing Lights
bard.description: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range. As a bonus action, you can move the lights up to 60 feet to a new spot within range.

bard.name: Prestidigitation
bard.description: A minor magical trick: you create harmless sensory effects, light or snuff a small flame, clean or soil an object, or chill/warm material within range.

bard.name: True Strike
bard.description: You gain a brief insight into the target's defenses. On your next turn, you have advantage on your first attack roll against the target.

cleric.name: Sacred Flame
cleric.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d8 radiant damage. The target gains no benefit from cover for this saving throw.

cleric.name: Guidance
cleric.description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add it to one ability check of its choice.

cleric.name: Light
cleric.description: You touch one object no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. It sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

cleric.name: Spare the Dying
cleric.description: You touch a living creature that has 0 hit points. The creature becomes stable. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.

cleric.name: Thaumaturgy
cleric.description: You manifest a minor wonder within range: your voice booms, flames flicker, harmless tremors shake the ground, or an unlocked door flies open.

cleric.name: Resistance
cleric.description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add it to one saving throw of its choice.

cleric.name: Mending
cleric.description: This spell repairs a single break or tear no larger than 1 foot in an object you touch, leaving no trace of the former damage.

druid.name: Shillelagh
druid.description: A club or quarterstaff you are holding is imbued with nature's power. For the duration, you can use your spellcasting ability for attack and damage rolls, and the damage die becomes a d8.

druid.name: Thorn Whip
druid.description: You create a vine-like whip covered in thorns. Make a melee spell attack; on a hit, the creature takes 1d6 piercing damage and, if Large or smaller, is pulled up to 10 feet closer to you.

druid.name: Poison Spray
druid.description: You project a puff of noxious gas at a creature within range. The creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d12 poison damage.

druid.name: Druidcraft
druid.description: You whisper to the spirits of nature to create a minor effect: predict weather, cause a flower to bloom, or create a harmless sensory effect.

druid.name: Produce Flame
druid.description: A flickering flame appears in your hand, shedding bright light in a 10-foot radius. You can hurl it as a ranged spell attack (range 30 feet) dealing 1d8 fire damage on a hit.

druid.name: Guidance
druid.description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add it to one ability check of its choice.

sorcerer.name: Fire Bolt
sorcerer.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object. Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.

sorcerer.name: Ray of Frost
sorcerer.description: A frigid beam streaks toward a creature. On a hit, it takes 1d8 cold damage and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

sorcerer.name: Shocking Grasp
sorcerer.description: Lightning springs from your hand. Make a melee spell attack (advantage if target wears metal armor); on a hit, the target takes 1d8 lightning damage and can't take reactions until the start of its next turn.

sorcerer.name: Chill Touch
sorcerer.description: You create a ghostly skeletal hand in a creature's space. Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage and can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn.

sorcerer.name: Acid Splash
sorcerer.description: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one or two creatures within 5 feet of each other; each target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage.

sorcerer.name: Minor Illusion
sorcerer.description: You create a sound or image of an object within range. A creature that examines the illusion can identify it as such with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC.

sorcerer.name: Mage Hand
sorcerer.description: A spectral floating hand appears at a point you choose. You can use it to manipulate objects, open unlocked doors, stow or retrieve items, or pour vials.

sorcerer.name: Prestidigitation
sorcerer.description: A minor magical trick: create harmless sensory effects, light or snuff a small flame, clean or soil an object, or chill/warm material.

warlock.name: Eldritch Blast
warlock.description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature. Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage. Creates additional beams at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

warlock.name: Chill Touch
warlock.description: You create a ghostly skeletal hand in a creature's space. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage and can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn.

warlock.name: Minor Illusion
warlock.description: You create a sound or image of an object within range. A creature that examines the illusion can identify it as such with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check.

warlock.name: Mage Hand
warlock.description: A spectral floating hand appears at a point you choose. You can use it to manipulate objects, open unlocked doors, stow or retrieve items, or pour vials.

warlock.name: Prestidigitation
warlock.description: A minor magical trick: create harmless sensory effects, light or snuff a small flame, clean or soil an object, or chill/warm material.

warlock.name: True Strike
warlock.description: You gain a brief insight into the target's defenses. On your next turn, you have advantage on your first attack roll against the target.

warlock.name: Poison Spray
warlock.description: You project a puff of noxious gas. The creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d12 poison damage.

wizard.name: Fire Bolt
wizard.description: You hurl a mote of fire. Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.

wizard.name: Ray of Frost
wizard.description: A frigid beam streaks toward a creature. On a hit, it takes 1d8 cold damage and its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

wizard.name: Shocking Grasp
wizard.description: Lightning springs from your hand. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 lightning damage and can't take reactions until the start of its next turn.

wizard.name: Chill Touch
wizard.description: You create a ghostly skeletal hand in a creature's space. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage and can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn.

wizard.name: Acid Splash
wizard.description: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one or two creatures within 5 feet of each other; each must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage.

wizard.name: Minor Illusion
wizard.description: You create a sound or image of an object within range. A creature that examines the illusion can identify it as such with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check.

wizard.name: Mage Hand
wizard.description: A spectral floating hand appears at a point you choose. You can use it to manipulate objects, open unlocked doors, stow or retrieve items, or pour vials.

wizard.name: Prestidigitation
wizard.description: A minor magical trick: create harmless sensory effects, light or snuff a small flame, clean or soil an object, or chill/warm material.

wizard.name: Light
wizard.description: You touch one object no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. It sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

wizard.name: Dancing Lights
wizard.description: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range. As a bonus action, you can move the lights up to 60 feet to a new spot within range.

wizard.name: Mending
wizard.description: This spell repairs a single break or tear no larger than 1 foot in an object you touch, leaving no trace of the former damage.

wizard.name: True Strike
wizard.description: You gain a brief insight into the target's defenses. On your next turn, you have advantage on your first attack roll against the target.

bard.name: Healing Word
bard.description: A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

bard.name: Charm Person
bard.description: You attempt to charm a humanoid within range. It must make a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you until the spell ends or until you harm it.

bard.name: Sleep
bard.description: This spell sends creatures into a magical slumber. Roll 5d8; the total is how many hit points of creatures this spell can affect, affecting lowest HP creatures first.

bard.name: Thunderwave
bard.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d8 thunder damage and being pushed 10 feet away on a failed save.

bard.name: Heroism
bard.description: A willing creature gains immunity to the frightened condition and gains temporary hit points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns.

bard.name: Detect Magic
bard.description: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you. If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object that bears magic.

bard.name: Faerie Fire
bard.description: Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light. Any creature in the area when the spell is cast is also outlined if it fails a Dexterity saving throw. Outlined objects and creatures shed dim light, and attack rolls against them have advantage.

bard.name: Dissonant Whispers
bard.description: You whisper a discordant melody that only one creature of your choice within range can hear, wracking it with pain. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d6 psychic damage on a failure and using its reaction to move away from you.

cleric.name: Cure Wounds
cleric.description: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.

cleric.name: Bless
cleric.description: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, it can roll a d4 and add the number to the roll.

cleric.name: Guiding Bolt
cleric.description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature of your choice within range. Make a ranged spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll made against the target before the end of your next turn has advantage.

cleric.name: Healing Word
cleric.description: A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

cleric.name: Sanctuary
cleric.description: You ward a creature within range against attack. Until the spell ends, any creature who targets the warded creature with an attack or harmful spell must first make a Wisdom saving throw.

cleric.name: Shield of Faith
cleric.description: A shimmering field appears and surrounds a creature of your choice within range, granting it a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.

druid.name: Cure Wounds
druid.description: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.

druid.name: Entangle
druid.description: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square from a point within range. Each creature in that area must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained for the duration.

druid.name: Healing Word
druid.description: A creature of your choice within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

druid.name: Faerie Fire
druid.description: Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light. Any creature in the area is outlined if it fails a Dexterity saving throw. Outlined creatures and objects can't benefit from being invisible, and attack rolls against them have advantage.

druid.name: Fog Cloud
druid.description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured.

druid.name: Speak with Animals
druid.description: You gain the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration. The knowledge and awareness of many beasts is limited by their intelligence.

paladin.name: Bless
paladin.description: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw, it can roll a d4 and add the number to the roll.

paladin.name: Cure Wounds
paladin.description: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

paladin.name: Divine Favor
paladin.description: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage on a hit.

paladin.name: Shield of Faith
paladin.description: A shimmering field appears around a creature of your choice within range, granting it a +2 bonus to AC for the duration.

paladin.name: Heroism
paladin.description: A willing creature gains immunity to the frightened condition and gains temporary hit points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns.

ranger.name: Hunter's Mark
ranger.description: You choose a creature you can see and mystically mark it as your quarry. You deal an extra 1d6 damage to the target whenever you hit it with a weapon attack, and you have advantage on Perception and Survival checks to find it.

ranger.name: Cure Wounds
ranger.description: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

ranger.name: Fog Cloud
ranger.description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of heavily obscuring fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners.

ranger.name: Speak with Animals
ranger.description: You gain the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration.

ranger.name: Longstrider
ranger.description: You touch a creature. The target's speed increases by 10 feet until the spell ends.

sorcerer.name: Magic Missile
sorcerer.description: You create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range, dealing 1d4+1 force damage. The darts all strike simultaneously.

sorcerer.name: Shield
sorcerer.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack.

sorcerer.name: Mage Armor
sorcerer.description: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor. Until the spell ends, the target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier.

sorcerer.name: Burning Hands
sorcerer.description: A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

sorcerer.name: Charm Person
sorcerer.description: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you until the spell ends or you harm it.

sorcerer.name: Sleep
sorcerer.description: This spell sends creatures into a magical slumber. Roll 5d8; creatures are affected in ascending order of their current hit points.

warlock.name: Hex
warlock.description: You place a curse on a creature within range. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage to the target whenever you hit it with an attack. Also choose one ability; the target has disadvantage on ability checks made with that ability.

warlock.name: Hellish Rebuke
warlock.description: You point your finger and the creature that damaged you is momentarily surrounded by hellish flames. It must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d10 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

warlock.name: Charm Person
warlock.description: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you until the spell ends or you harm it.

warlock.name: Witch Bolt
warlock.description: A beam of crackling blue energy lances out toward a creature within range. On a hit, the target takes 1d12 lightning damage. On subsequent turns you can use your action to deal 1d12 lightning damage automatically.

wizard.name: Magic Missile
wizard.description: You create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range, dealing 1d4+1 force damage.

wizard.name: Shield
wizard.description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack.

wizard.name: Mage Armor
wizard.description: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor. Until the spell ends, the target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier.

wizard.name: Burning Hands
wizard.description: A thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 fire damage on a failed save.

wizard.name: Detect Magic
wizard.description: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you. You can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object that bears magic.

wizard.name: Find Familiar
wizard.description: You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose. The familiar acts independently of you but always obeys your commands.

wizard.name: Feather Fall
wizard.description: Choose up to five falling creatures within range. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round until the spell ends. If the creature lands before the spell ends, it takes no falling damage and lands on its feet.

wizard.name: Identify
wizard.description: You learn the properties of a magic item, how to use it, and whether it requires attunement. You also learn what spells are affecting the item.

bard.name: Hold Person
bard.description: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns.

bard.name: Invisibility
bard.description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the target's person. The spell ends if the target attacks or casts a spell.

bard.name: Suggestion
bard.description: You suggest a course of activity to a creature that can hear and understand you. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw or follow the suggestion to the best of its ability.

bard.name: Shatter
bard.description: A sudden loud ringing noise, painfully intense, erupts from a point of your choice within range. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 3d8 thunder damage on a failed save.

bard.name: Enhance Ability
bard.description: You touch a creature and bestow upon it a magical enhancement. Choose one of: Bear's Endurance (advantage on CON checks, 2d6 temp HP), Cat's Grace (advantage on DEX checks), Eagle's Splendor (advantage on CHA checks), Fox's Cunning (advantage on INT checks), Owl's Wisdom (advantage on WIS checks), or Bull's Strength (advantage on STR checks, double carry capacity).

cleric.name: Spiritual Weapon
cleric.description: You create a floating, spectral weapon within range. As a bonus action, you can move the weapon up to 20 feet and make a melee spell attack. On a hit, the target takes force damage equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

cleric.name: Hold Person
cleric.description: Choose a humanoid you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration.

cleric.name: Lesser Restoration
cleric.description: You touch a creature and can end either one disease or one condition afflicting it. The condition can be blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

cleric.name: Aid
cleric.description: Your spell bolsters your allies with toughness and resolve. Choose up to three creatures within range. Each target's hit point maximum and current hit points increase by 5 for the duration.

cleric.name: Silence
cleric.description: For the duration, no sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range. Any creature or object entirely inside the sphere is immune to thunder damage.

druid.name: Moonbeam
druid.description: A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range. Any creature that enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d10 radiant damage on a failed save.

druid.name: Barkskin
druid.description: You touch a willing creature. Until the spell ends, the target's skin has a rough, bark-like appearance, and the target's AC can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor it is wearing.

druid.name: Pass without Trace
druid.description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you, masking you and your companions from detection. For the duration, each creature you choose within 30 feet of you has a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

druid.name: Spike Growth
druid.description: The ground in a 20-foot radius centered on a point within range twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns. The area is difficult terrain; a creature moving through takes 2d4 piercing damage for every 5 feet traveled.

druid.name: Lesser Restoration
druid.description: You touch a creature and can end either one disease or one condition: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

paladin.name: Lesser Restoration
paladin.description: You touch a creature and can end either one disease or one condition afflicting it: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

paladin.name: Aid
paladin.description: Choose up to three creatures within range. Each target's hit point maximum and current hit points increase by 5 for the duration.

paladin.name: Find Steed
paladin.description: You summon a spirit that assumes the form of an unusually intelligent, strong, and loyal steed. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the steed can take one of several forms: warhorse, pony, camel, elk, or mastiff.

paladin.name: Branding Smite
paladin.description: The next time you hit a creature with a weapon attack before this spell ends, the weapon gleams with astral radiance as you strike. The attack deals an extra 2d6 radiant damage to the target, which becomes visible if it's invisible.

ranger.name: Pass without Trace
ranger.description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you. For the duration, each creature you choose within 30 feet of you has a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

ranger.name: Barkskin
ranger.description: The target's skin takes a rough, bark-like appearance, and the target's AC can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor it is wearing.

ranger.name: Silence
ranger.description: No sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose. Creatures inside are immune to thunder damage.

ranger.name: Spike Growth
ranger.description: The ground in a 20-foot radius sprouts hard spikes and thorns, becoming difficult terrain. A creature moving through it takes 2d4 piercing damage per 5 feet traveled.

sorcerer.name: Misty Step
sorcerer.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.

sorcerer.name: Mirror Image
sorcerer.description: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear in your space. Each time a creature targets you with an attack, roll a d20 to determine if the attack targets one of your duplicates instead.

sorcerer.name: Scorching Ray
sorcerer.description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. You can hurl them at one target or several. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray; on a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage.

sorcerer.name: Shatter
sorcerer.description: A sudden loud ringing noise erupts from a point within range. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 3d8 thunder damage on a failed save.

sorcerer.name: Invisibility
sorcerer.description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. The spell ends if the target attacks or casts a spell.

sorcerer.name: Web
sorcerer.description: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing at a point of your choice within range. The webs fill a 20-foot cube and are difficult terrain; creatures that start their turn in the webs or enter them must make a Dexterity saving throw or be restrained.

warlock.name: Misty Step
warlock.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.

warlock.name: Darkness
warlock.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15-foot-radius sphere for the duration. Darkvision can't penetrate this darkness.

warlock.name: Hold Person
warlock.description: Choose a humanoid you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration.

warlock.name: Suggestion
warlock.description: You suggest a course of activity to a creature that can hear and understand you. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw or follow the suggestion to the best of its ability.

wizard.name: Misty Step
wizard.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see.

wizard.name: Mirror Image
wizard.description: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear in your space. Each time a creature targets you with an attack, roll a d20 to determine if the attack targets one of your duplicates instead.

wizard.name: Scorching Ray
wizard.description: You create three rays of fire and hurl them at targets within range. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray; on a hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage.

wizard.name: Invisibility
wizard.description: A creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. The spell ends if the target attacks or casts a spell.

wizard.name: Web
wizard.description: You conjure sticky webbing filling a 20-foot cube. Creatures starting or entering the area must make a Dexterity saving throw or be restrained.

wizard.name: Levitate
wizard.description: One creature or object of your choice that you can see within range rises vertically, up to 20 feet, and remains suspended there for the duration.

bard.name: Hypnotic Pattern
bard.description: You create a twisting pattern of colors that weaves through the air inside a 30-foot cube within range. Each creature in the area must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes incapacitated and has a speed of 0.

bard.name: Fear
bard.description: You project a phantasmal image of a creature's worst fears. Each creature in a 30-foot cone must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or drop whatever it is holding and become frightened.

bard.name: Dispel Magic
bard.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For each spell of 4th level or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability (DC 10 + the spell's level).

bard.name: Major Image
bard.description: You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon that is no larger than a 20-foot cube. The image appears at a spot you can see within range and lasts for the duration.

cleric.name: Spirit Guardians
cleric.description: You call forth spirits to protect you. They flit around you to a distance of 15 feet for the duration. Any creature that enters the affected area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d8 radiant (or necrotic) damage on a failed save.

cleric.name: Revivify
cleric.description: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 hit point. This spell can't return to life a creature that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.

cleric.name: Dispel Magic
cleric.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For higher-level spells, make an ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

cleric.name: Bestow Curse
cleric.description: You touch a creature, and that creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become cursed. Choose the nature of the curse: disadvantage on ability checks of one type, disadvantage on attack rolls against you, make Wisdom saving throw or waste action, or take extra 1d8 necrotic damage from your attacks.

druid.name: Call Lightning
druid.description: A storm cloud appears in the shape of a cylinder that is 10 feet tall with a 60-foot radius. On each of your turns until the spell ends, you can use your action to call down a bolt of lightning, dealing 3d10 lightning damage.

druid.name: Conjure Animals
druid.description: You summon fey spirits that take the form of beasts and appear in unoccupied spaces within range. Choose one of several options for the beasts summoned.

druid.name: Dispel Magic
druid.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For higher-level spells, make an ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

druid.name: Plant Growth
druid.description: This spell channels vitality into plants within a specific area. Using a 1 action, overgrown plants in a 100-foot radius turn the area into difficult terrain. Using 8 hours, plants in a half-mile radius are enriched for 1 year.

paladin.name: Revivify
paladin.description: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 hit point.

paladin.name: Dispel Magic
paladin.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends.

paladin.name: Aura of Vitality
paladin.description: Healing energy radiates from you in an aura with a 30-foot radius. Until the spell ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. You can use a bonus action to cause one creature in the aura to regain 2d6 hit points.

ranger.name: Conjure Animals
ranger.description: You summon fey spirits that take the form of beasts in unoccupied spaces within range. Choose one of several options based on CR.

ranger.name: Nondetection
ranger.description: For the duration, you hide a target that you touch from divination magic. The target can't be targeted by any divination magic or perceived through magical scrying sensors.

ranger.name: Wind Wall
ranger.description: A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose within range. The wall is up to 50 feet long, 15 feet high, and 1 foot thick. Any creature in the wall's area when it appears must make a Strength saving throw.

sorcerer.name: Fireball
sorcerer.description: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose and then blossoms into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

sorcerer.name: Lightning Bolt
sorcerer.description: A stroke of lightning forming a line 100 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 lightning damage on a failed save.

sorcerer.name: Haste
sorcerer.description: Choose a willing creature you can see within range. Until the spell ends, the target's speed is doubled, it gains a +2 bonus to AC, it has advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and it gains an additional action on each of its turns.

sorcerer.name: Counterspell
sorcerer.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the creature is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect. If it is casting a spell of 4th level or higher, make an ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

sorcerer.name: Fly
sorcerer.description: You touch a willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall.

warlock.name: Hunger of Hadar
warlock.description: You open a gateway to the dark between the stars, a region infested with unknown horrors. A 20-foot-radius sphere of blackness and bitter cold appears, centered on a point within range. Creatures in the area are blinded and take 2d6 cold damage at the start of their turn.

warlock.name: Hypnotic Pattern
warlock.description: You create a twisting pattern of colors inside a 30-foot cube within range. Each creature in the area must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes incapacitated and has a speed of 0.

warlock.name: Counterspell
warlock.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the creature is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails. If it's 4th level or higher, make an ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

warlock.name: Vampiric Touch
warlock.description: The touch of your shadow-wreathed hand can siphon life force from others to heal your wounds. Make a melee spell attack; on a hit, the target takes 3d6 necrotic damage, and you regain hit points equal to half the amount of necrotic damage dealt.

wizard.name: Fireball
wizard.description: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger and blossoms into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

wizard.name: Lightning Bolt
wizard.description: A stroke of lightning forms a 100-foot line. Each creature in it must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

wizard.name: Haste
wizard.description: Choose a willing creature you can see within range. Its speed doubles, it gains +2 to AC, advantage on Dexterity saves, and an extra action on each of its turns.

wizard.name: Counterspell
wizard.description: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. Spells of 3rd level or lower automatically fail; for higher levels, make an ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

wizard.name: Fly
wizard.description: You touch a willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if still aloft.

wizard.name: Slow
wizard.description: You alter time around up to six creatures of your choice in a 40-foot cube within range. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be slowed: halved speed, -2 to AC and Dexterity saves, can't use reactions, can only attack once per turn.

bard.name: Greater Invisibility
bard.description: You or a creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is invisible as long as it is on the target's person. Unlike regular invisibility, the spell doesn't end if the target attacks or casts a spell.

bard.name: Confusion
bard.description: This spell assaults and twists the minds of up to six creatures in a 10-foot-radius sphere. Each targeted creature must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target can't take reactions and rolls a d10 at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior.

bard.name: Polymorph
bard.description: This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling creature must make a Wisdom saving throw to avoid the effect. The spell has no effect on a shapechanger or a creature with 0 hit points.

cleric.name: Guardian of Faith
cleric.description: A Large spectral guardian appears and hovers for the duration in an unoccupied space of your choice. Any creature hostile to you that moves to a space within 10 feet of the guardian must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 20 radiant or necrotic damage on a failed save.

cleric.name: Death Ward
cleric.description: You touch a creature and grant it a measure of protection from death. The first time the target would drop to 0 hit points as a result of taking damage, the target instead drops to 1 hit point, and the spell ends.

cleric.name: Banishment
cleric.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another place of existence. The target must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target is banished.

druid.name: Polymorph
druid.description: This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling creature must make a Wisdom saving throw to avoid the effect.

druid.name: Blight
druid.description: Necromantic energy washes over a creature of your choice within range, draining moisture and vitality. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 8d8 necrotic damage.

druid.name: Freedom of Movement
druid.description: You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target's movement is unaffected by difficult terrain, and spells and other magical effects can neither reduce the target's speed nor cause the target to be paralyzed or restrained.

paladin.name: Banishment
paladin.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another place of existence. The target must make a Charisma saving throw or be banished.

paladin.name: Death Ward
paladin.description: You touch a creature and grant it protection from death. The first time the target would drop to 0 hit points as a result of taking damage, it instead drops to 1 hit point, and the spell ends.

ranger.name: Freedom of Movement
ranger.description: The target's movement is unaffected by difficult terrain, and magic can neither reduce the target's speed nor cause it to be paralyzed or restrained.

ranger.name: Stoneskin
ranger.description: This spell turns the flesh of a willing creature as hard as stone. Until the spell ends, the target has resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

sorcerer.name: Greater Invisibility
sorcerer.description: You or a creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Unlike regular invisibility, the spell doesn't end when the target attacks or casts a spell.

sorcerer.name: Banishment
sorcerer.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another place of existence. The target must make a Charisma saving throw or be banished.

sorcerer.name: Confusion
sorcerer.description: This spell assaults and twists the minds of up to six creatures in a 10-foot-radius sphere. Each targeted creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have its behavior randomized each turn.

sorcerer.name: Ice Storm
sorcerer.description: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds to the ground in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder. Each creature in the cylinder must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d8 bludgeoning and 4d6 cold damage on a failed save.

warlock.name: Banishment
warlock.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another place of existence. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be banished.

warlock.name: Dimension Door
warlock.description: You teleport yourself from your current location to any other spot within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction.

warlock.name: Blight
warlock.description: Necromantic energy washes over a creature within range. The target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

wizard.name: Greater Invisibility
wizard.description: You or a creature you touch becomes invisible until the spell ends. Unlike regular invisibility, the spell doesn't end when the target attacks or casts a spell.

wizard.name: Polymorph
wizard.description: This spell transforms a creature that you can see within range into a new form. An unwilling creature must make a Wisdom saving throw to avoid the effect.

wizard.name: Dimension Door
wizard.description: You teleport yourself to any spot within range that you can see, can visualize, or can describe by distance and direction.

wizard.name: Banishment
wizard.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another place of existence. The target must make a Charisma saving throw or be banished.

bard.name: Hold Monster
bard.description: Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration. This spell has no effect on undead. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns.

bard.name: Mass Cure Wounds
bard.description: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point of your choice within range. Choose up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on that point. Each target regains hit points equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

bard.name: Dominate Person
bard.description: You attempt to beguile a humanoid that you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. While the target is charmed, you have a telepathic link with it as long as you're on the same plane.

cleric.name: Flame Strike
cleric.description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 fire and 4d6 radiant damage on a failed save.

cleric.name: Mass Cure Wounds
cleric.description: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point of your choice within range. Choose up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius sphere. Each target regains hit points equal to 3d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

cleric.name: Raise Dead
cleric.description: You return a dead creature you touch to life, provided that it has been dead no longer than 10 days. If the creature's soul is both willing and at liberty to rejoin the body, the creature returns to life with 1 hit point.

druid.name: Conjure Elemental
druid.description: You call forth an elemental servant. Choose an area of air, earth, fire, or water that fills a 10-foot cube within range. An elemental of challenge rating 5 or lower appropriate to the area you chose appears in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of it.

druid.name: Greater Restoration
druid.description: You imbue a creature you touch with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect. You can reduce the target's exhaustion level by one, or end one of the following effects: a charm, a curse, any reduction to ability scores, or a reduction to hit point maximum.

druid.name: Scrying
druid.description: You can see and hear a particular creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw, modified by how well you know the target.

paladin.name: Raise Dead
paladin.description: You return a dead creature you touch to life, provided it has been dead no longer than 10 days. The creature returns to life with 1 hit point.

paladin.name: Destructive Wave
paladin.description: You strike the ground, creating a burst of divine energy that ripples outward from you. Each creature you choose within 30 feet of you must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 5d6 thunder damage, plus 5d6 radiant or necrotic damage (your choice), and is knocked prone.

ranger.name: Tree Stride
ranger.description: You gain the ability to enter a tree and move from inside it to inside another tree of the same kind within 500 feet.

ranger.name: Conjure Volley
ranger.description: You fire a piece of nonmagical ammunition from a ranged weapon or throw a nonmagical weapon into the air and choose a point within range. Hundreds of duplicates of the ammunition or weapon fall in a volley from above and then disappear, dealing 8d8 damage in a 40-foot-radius, 20-foot-high cylinder.

sorcerer.name: Cone of Cold
sorcerer.description: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands. Each creature in a 60-foot cone must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 cold damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

sorcerer.name: Hold Monster
sorcerer.description: Choose a creature that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration.

sorcerer.name: Dominate Person
sorcerer.description: You attempt to beguile a humanoid that you can see within range. It must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration, following your telepathic commands.

sorcerer.name: Cloudkill
sorcerer.description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of poisonous, yellow-green fog centered on a point you choose within range. The fog spreads around corners. A creature that starts its turn in the cloud must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 5d8 poison damage on a failed save.

warlock.name: Hold Monster
warlock.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration.

warlock.name: Scrying
warlock.description: You can see and hear a particular creature you choose that is on the same plane of existence as you. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw.

warlock.name: Dream
warlock.description: This spell shapes a creature's dreams. Choose a creature known to you as the target. The target must be asleep. You, or a willing creature you touch, enters a trance state, acting as a messenger.

wizard.name: Cone of Cold
wizard.description: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands. Each creature in a 60-foot cone must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 8d8 cold damage on a failed save.

wizard.name: Hold Monster
wizard.description: Choose a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for the duration.

wizard.name: Teleportation Circle
wizard.description: As you cast the spell, you draw a 10-foot-diameter circle on the ground inscribed with sigils that link your location to a permanent teleportation circle of your choice. A shimmering portal opens within the circle you drew and remains open until the end of your next turn.

wizard.name: Wall of Force
wizard.description: An invisible wall of force springs into existence at a point you choose within range. The wall appears in any orientation you choose: horizontally, vertically, or at an angle; it can be free-floating or resting on a solid surface.

bard.name: True Seeing
bard.description: You give the willing creature you touch the ability to see things as they actually are. For the duration, the creature has truesight, notices secret doors hidden by magic, and can see into the Ethereal Plane.

bard.name: Mass Suggestion
bard.description: You suggest a course of activity (in a sentence or two) to twelve or more creatures of your choice that you can see within range and that can hear and understand you. Creatures that fail their Wisdom saving throws follow the suggestion.

cleric.name: Heal
cleric.description: Choose a creature that you can see within range. A surge of positive energy washes through the creature, causing it to regain 70 hit points. This spell also ends blindness, deafness, and any diseases affecting the target.

cleric.name: Heroes' Feast
cleric.description: You bring forth a great feast, including magnificent food and drink. The feast takes 1 hour to consume. The benefits of the feast last for 24 hours: immunity to poison and disease, advantage on Wisdom saving throws, and an increase to hit point maximum.

cleric.name: Word of Recall
cleric.description: You and up to five willing creatures within 5 feet of you instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary. You designate the sanctuary by casting this spell in the desired location.

druid.name: Sunbeam
druid.description: A beam of brilliant light flashes out from your hand in a 5-foot-wide, 60-foot-long line. Each creature in the line must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 6d8 radiant damage and is blinded until your next turn.

druid.name: True Seeing
druid.description: You give the willing creature you touch the ability to see things as they actually are. The creature has truesight, notices secret doors hidden by magic, and can see into the Ethereal Plane.

druid.name: Heroes' Feast
druid.description: You bring forth a great feast. After consuming the feast over 1 hour, each participant gains 2d10 temporary hit points, immunity to poison and disease, advantage on Wisdom saving throws, and this effect lasts 24 hours.

sorcerer.name: Disintegrate
sorcerer.description: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger to a target you can see within range. The target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 10d6+40 force damage. If this damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is disintegrated.

sorcerer.name: Chain Lightning
sorcerer.description: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target of your choice that you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from that target to as many as three other targets, each of which must be within 30 feet of the first target.

sorcerer.name: Globe of Invulnerability
sorcerer.description: An immobile, faintly shimmering barrier springs into existence in a 10-foot radius around you and remains for the duration. Any spell of 5th level or lower cast from outside the barrier can't affect creatures or objects within it.

warlock.name: True Seeing
warlock.description: You give the willing creature you touch the ability to see things as they actually are, including truesight and seeing into the Ethereal Plane.

warlock.name: Mass Suggestion
warlock.description: You suggest a course of activity to up to twelve creatures within range. Creatures that fail their Wisdom saving throws follow the suggestion.

warlock.name: Circle of Death
warlock.description: A sphere of negative energy ripples out in a 60-foot-radius sphere from a point within range. Each living creature in that area must make a Constitution saving throw. A target takes 8d6 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

wizard.name: Disintegrate
wizard.description: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger. The target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 10d6+40 force damage. If this reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is disintegrated.

wizard.name: Chain Lightning
wizard.description: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from that target to as many as three other targets within 30 feet.

wizard.name: Globe of Invulnerability
wizard.description: An immobile barrier springs into existence in a 10-foot radius around you. Any spell of 5th level or lower cast from outside can't affect creatures or objects within it.

wizard.name: True Seeing
wizard.description: You give the willing creature you touch truesight, the ability to notice secret doors, and the ability to see into the Ethereal Plane.

bard.name: Prismatic Spray
bard.description: Eight rays of light flash from your hand. Each ray's effect is determined by rolling a d8: fire, acid, lightning, poison, cold, radiant, petrification, or struck by two rays.

bard.name: Etherealness
bard.description: You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, in the area where it overlaps with your current plane. You remain in the Border Ethereal for the duration.

cleric.name: Resurrection
cleric.description: You touch a dead creature that has been dead for no more than a century, that didn't die of old age, and that isn't undead. The target returns to life with all its hit points.

cleric.name: Plane Shift
cleric.description: You and up to eight willing creatures who link hands in a circle are transported to a different plane of existence. Alternatively, you can force an unwilling creature to make a Charisma saving throw.

cleric.name: Fire Storm
cleric.description: A storm made up of sheets of roaring flame appears in a location you choose within range. The area can be up to ten 10-foot cubes. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. It takes 7d10 fire damage on a failed save.

druid.name: Plane Shift
druid.description: You and up to eight willing creatures are transported to a different plane of existence. Alternatively, you can force an unwilling creature to make a Charisma saving throw.

druid.name: Regenerate
druid.description: You touch a creature and stimulate its natural healing ability. The target regains 4d8+15 hit points. For the duration of the spell, the target regains 1 hit point at the start of each of its turns.

sorcerer.name: Teleport
sorcerer.description: This spell instantly transports you and up to eight willing creatures of your choice that you can see within range, or a single object you can see within range, to a destination you select.

sorcerer.name: Prismatic Spray
sorcerer.description: Eight rays of light flash from your hand. Each creature in a 60-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw; on a failed save, the creature is struck by one randomly determined ray.

sorcerer.name: Finger of Death
sorcerer.description: You send negative energy coursing through a creature within range, causing it searing pain. The target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 7d8+30 necrotic damage on a failed save.

warlock.name: Finger of Death
warlock.description: You send negative energy coursing through a creature within range. The target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 7d8+30 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

warlock.name: Etherealness
warlock.description: You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane. You remain there for the duration or until you use your action to dismiss the spell.

wizard.name: Teleport
wizard.description: This spell instantly transports you and up to eight willing creatures, or a single object, to a destination you select. The destination must be familiar to you.

wizard.name: Prismatic Spray
wizard.description: Eight rays of light flash from your hand. Each creature in a 60-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw; on failure, it is struck by one randomly determined ray.

wizard.name: Finger of Death
wizard.description: You send negative energy coursing through a creature within range. The target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 7d8+30 necrotic damage on a failed save.

wizard.name: Reverse Gravity
wizard.description: This spell reverses gravity in a 50-foot-radius, 100-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range. All creatures and objects not somehow anchored to the ground in the area fall upward.

bard.name: Power Word Stun
bard.description: You speak a word of power that overwhelms the mind of one creature you can see within range, leaving it dumbfounded. If the target has 150 hit points or fewer, it is stunned. Otherwise, the spell has no effect.

bard.name: Feeblemind
bard.description: You blast the mind of a creature you can see within range, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality. The target takes 4d6 psychic damage and must make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failed save, the creature's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1.

cleric.name: Holy Aura
cleric.description: Divine light washes out from you and coalesces in a soft radiance in a 30-foot radius around you. Creatures of your choice in that radius when you cast this spell shed dim light in a 5-foot radius and have advantage on all saving throws.

cleric.name: Antimagic Field
cleric.description: A 10-foot-radius invisible sphere of antimagic surrounds you. This area is divorced from the magical energy that suffuses the multiverse. Within the sphere, spells can't be cast, summoned creatures disappear, and even magic items become mundane.

druid.name: Sunburst
druid.description: Brilliant sunlight blazes in a 60-foot radius centered on a point you choose. Each creature in that light must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 12d6 radiant damage and is blinded for 1 minute.

druid.name: Animal Shapes
druid.description: Your magic turns others into beasts. Choose any number of willing creatures that you can see within range. You transform each target into the form of a Large or smaller beast with a challenge rating of 4 or lower.

sorcerer.name: Power Word Stun
sorcerer.description: You speak a word of power that overwhelms the mind of one creature you can see within range. If the target has 150 hit points or fewer, it is stunned. Otherwise, the spell has no effect.

sorcerer.name: Sunburst
sorcerer.description: Brilliant sunlight blazes in a 60-foot radius. Each creature in the light must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 12d6 radiant damage and being blinded for 1 minute on a failed save.

sorcerer.name: Demiplane
sorcerer.description: You create a shadowy door on a flat solid surface that you can see within range. The door is large enough to allow Medium creatures to pass through unhindered. When opened, the door leads to a demiplane that appears to be an empty room 30 feet in each dimension.

warlock.name: Power Word Stun
warlock.description: You speak a word of power that overwhelms the mind of one creature you can see within range. If the target has 150 hit points or fewer, it is stunned.

warlock.name: Demiplane
warlock.description: You create a shadowy door on a flat solid surface. When opened, it leads to a demiplane that appears to be an empty room 30 feet in each dimension.

wizard.name: Power Word Stun
wizard.description: You speak a word of power that overwhelms the mind of one creature you can see. If the target has 150 hit points or fewer, it is stunned.

wizard.name: Feeblemind
wizard.description: You blast the mind of a creature you can see. The target takes 4d6 psychic damage and must make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failed save, the creature's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1.

wizard.name: Demiplane
wizard.description: You create a shadowy door on a flat solid surface leading to a demiplane that appears to be an empty room 30 feet in each dimension.

bard.name: True Polymorph
bard.description: Choose one creature or nonmagical object that you can see within range. You transform the creature into a different creature, the creature into a nonmagical object, or the object into a creature. The transformation lasts for the duration, or until the target drops to 0 hit points.

bard.name: Power Word Heal
bard.description: A wave of healing energy washes over a creature you touch. The target regains all its hit points. If the creature is charmed, frightened, paralyzed, or stunned, the condition ends. If the creature is prone, it can use its reaction to stand up.

cleric.name: Mass Heal
cleric.description: A flood of healing energy flows from you into injured creatures around you. You restore up to 700 hit points, divided as you choose among any number of creatures that you can see within range.

cleric.name: True Resurrection
cleric.description: You touch a creature that has been dead for no longer than 200 years and that died for any reason except old age. If the creature's soul is free and willing, the creature is restored to life with all its hit points.

cleric.name: Gate
cleric.description: You conjure a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see within range to a precise location on a different plane of existence. The portal is a circular opening, which you can make 5 to 20 feet in diameter.

druid.name: Storm of Vengeance
druid.description: A churning storm cloud forms centered on a point you can see and spreads to a radius of 360 feet. Each round the storm is active it can unleash different effects: thunder, rain of acid, lightning bolts, hail, and biting cold.

druid.name: True Polymorph
druid.description: Choose one creature or nonmagical object that you can see within range. You transform the creature into a different creature, a creature into an object, or an object into a creature.

druid.name: Foresight
druid.description: You touch a willing creature and bestow a limited ability to see into the immediate future. For the duration, the target can't be surprised and has advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws. Additionally, other creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the target.

sorcerer.name: Wish
sorcerer.description: Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal creature can cast. By simply speaking aloud, you can alter the very foundations of reality. The basic use of this spell is to duplicate any other spell of 8th level or lower. You can also use it to make something happen outside the normal rules.

sorcerer.name: Meteor Swarm
sorcerer.description: Blazing orbs of fire plummet to the ground at four different points you can see within range. Each creature in a 40-foot-radius sphere centered on each point must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 20d6 fire and 20d6 bludgeoning damage on a failed save.

sorcerer.name: Power Word Kill
sorcerer.description: You utter a word of power that can compel one creature you can see within range to die instantly. If the creature you choose has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, the spell has no effect.

warlock.name: True Polymorph
warlock.description: You transform a creature into a different creature, a creature into a nonmagical object, or a nonmagical object into a creature.

warlock.name: Power Word Kill
warlock.description: You utter a word of power that can compel one creature you can see within range to die instantly. If the creature has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies.

warlock.name: Wish
warlock.description: Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal creature can cast. By simply speaking aloud, you can alter the very foundations of reality.

wizard.name: Wish
wizard.description: Wish is the mightiest spell a mortal creature can cast. By simply speaking aloud, you can alter the very foundations of reality in ways that exceed the effects of any other spell.

wizard.name: Meteor Swarm
wizard.description: Blazing orbs of fire plummet to the ground at four different points you can see within range. Each creature in a 40-foot-radius sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 20d6 fire and 20d6 bludgeoning damage on a failed save.

wizard.name: Power Word Kill
wizard.description: You utter a word of power that can compel one creature you can see within range to die instantly. If the creature you choose has 100 hit points or fewer, it dies.

wizard.name: Foresight
wizard.description: You touch a willing creature and bestow a limited ability to see into the immediate future. The target can't be surprised, has advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws, and other creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against it.
